title: Peqach #6492
definition:
Pekah = "opened"

 1) son of Remaliah, originally a captain of king Pekahiah of Israel,
    murdered Pekahiah, usurped the throne and became the 18th king of
    the northern kingdom of Israel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pekah = "opened"

 1) son of Remaliah, originally a captain of king Pekahiah of Israel,
    murdered Pekahiah, usurped the throne and became the 18th king of
